title: solanum microdontum var. metriophyllum
intro: Solanum microdontum var. metriophyllum, also known as Metriopilosa, is a type of plant that belongs to the Solanum genus. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Metriophyllum has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin irritations, offering health benefits such as relief from pain and reduced inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
